name: node-undici
title: node-undici
description:
Node.js HTTP/1.1 client
undici provides the Node.js core HTTP client, using WebAssembly to achieve
performance and pluggability. It brings features like:
- redirect support
- native mocking layer using MockAgent
- Client, Pool, Agent are unified by a Dispatcher API
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-undici because Node.js HTTP/1.1 client.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-undici as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-undici with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-undici --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
